text.title: Local LLM Ollama Failure Modes
text.summary: Five recurring production failures with local-LLM Ollama deployments.

antipattern.symptom: Agent code raises ConnectionRefusedError at request time; on-call paged.
antipattern.root-cause: No /api/tags health check at startup; Ollama service was down.
antipattern.fix: Call GET /api/tags at agent startup; raise "Ollama not running" with start command (rule r2).

antipattern.symptom: Throughput 0.5 tok/s instead of 60 tok/s; host swap usage spikes.
antipattern.root-cause: 70B model on 16 GB host — pages to disk continuously.
antipattern.fix: Verify ram_floor_gb >= 48 for 70B; switch to 13B or upgrade host (rule r3).

antipattern.symptom: Production quality regressions appear in complex-reasoning tasks after Ollama adoption.
antipattern.root-cause: Local 7B used for tasks requiring Opus / GPT-4o-level reasoning; no gold-eval pre-check.
antipattern.fix: Run 30-item gold eval; if local model fails, route hard tasks back to cloud (rule r5).

antipattern.symptom: Codebase has two HTTP client paths (one for cloud, one for Ollama); cloud bugs don't show in tests.
antipattern.root-cause: Direct /api/generate calls instead of /v1 OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
antipattern.fix: Refactor to OpenAI SDK with base_url switch; delete the Ollama-only code path (rule r4).

antipattern.symptom: First request after deploy times out; 4 GB model downloads inline.
antipattern.root-cause: ollama pull was not part of deploy; first-call pulled the model on demand.
antipattern.fix: Pre-pull models in deploy script or systemd ExecStartPre. Block service start until model is on disk.
